known_scaffold_limitations: x-axis windows, substrates, W sleeve, annuli, cans, and rods use square BRIK/panel proxies instead of rotated PCON/TUBE or Boolean CAD.
z-axis side ports are approximated by rectangular z-band plus azimuth cutouts, not exact circular Boolean holes.
TES absorber stack is pixelized as 6 x 376 side-entry Ta pixels, matching the DEMO2/new_geo_re detector-core convention.
Native MEGAlib Trigger/Veto blocks are not added; downstream veto timing remains separate.

step00_closure.accepted_scope: Simulation-layer proxy closure. This is not CAD; x-axis circular parts and side holes remain proxy approximations.

pointing_policy.zenith_frame: FarFieldAreaSource theta/phi bins remain in global zenith coordinates
pointing_policy.implementation: whole detector mass model is tilted through InstrumentFrame.Rotation 0 45 0

pointing_policy.zenith_frame: FarFieldAreaSource theta/phi bins remain in global zenith coordinates
pointing_policy.implementation: whole detector mass model is tilted through InstrumentFrame.Rotation 0 45 0

pointing_policy.implementation: whole detector mass model is tilted through InstrumentFrame.Rotation 0 45 0

delayed_transport.TE_source: Cosima SIM TE live-time record; radioactive daughter decays can make TE differ from triggers/fixed_total_activity_Bq

known_limitations: exact-position delayed source uses sampled PointSource support; support size and seed are recorded in exactpos_delayed_source_manifest.json
full weighted-table one-block-per-RPIP source remains a robustness target if Cosima source parsing can be made practical
